news.t: Eldridge Marks Three Years of CLOZ: Enhancing Income Outside the Aggregate Bond Index

overview.description: The Eldridge BBB-B CLO ETF (CLOZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund actively invests in USD-denominated collateralized loan obligations of any maturity that are rated between BBB+ and B-. CLOZ was launched on Jan 24, 2023 and is issued by Eldridge.

data.title: Eldridge Marks Three Years of CLOZ: Enhancing Income Outside the Aggregate Bond Index
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Eldridge marks the third anniversary of the Eldridge BBB‑B CLO ETF (NYSE Arca: CLOZ). Eldridge believes CLOZ has provided investors with a consistent source of enhanced inco...
